title: EinsteinGptSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents settings for Einstein Generative AI features in an org. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field

disableAIProvAWSBedrock.description: Indicates whether AWS Bedrock is turned off and access to its models are blocked. The default value is false.

disableAIProvAzureOpenAI.description: Indicates whether Azure OpenAI is turned off and access to its models are blocked. The default value is false.

disableAIProvOpenAI.description: Indicates whether OpenAI is turned off and access to its models are blocked. The default value is false.

disableAIProvVertexGemini.description: Indicates whether Vertex AI (Google) is turned off and access to its models are blocked. The default value is false.

disableAIProviderRegionFallback.description: Indicates whether the fallback of Azure OpenAI requests outside the model endpoint region for your org is turned off. The default value is false.

enableAIModelBeta.description: Indicates whether to turn on beta models for Einstein generative AI features. The default value is false.

enableEinsteinGptGlobalLangSupport.description: Indicates whether to turn on global languages with prompt templates. The default value is false.

enableEinsteinGptPlatform.description: Indicates whether to turn on generative AI features across Salesforce. The default value is false.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="EinsteinGptSettings">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="disableAIProvAWSBedrock" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="disableAIProvAzureOpenAI" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="disableAIProvOpenAI" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="disableAIProvVertexGemini" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="disableAIProviderRegionFallback" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableAIModelBeta" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableDeployOnlyActivePromptTemplateVersion" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableEinsteinGPTDeployPromptTemplatesAsActive" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableEinsteinGptAllowUnsafePTInputChanges" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableEinsteinGptGlobalLangSupport" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableEinsteinGptPlatform" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableEnhancedPromptSecurity" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enablePBJinjaSyntaxBeta" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
